title: Machath #4287
definition:
Mahath = "grasping"

 1) a Kohathite Levite of the house of Korah
 2) a Kohathite Levite in the reign of king Hezekiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Mahath = "grasping"

 1) a Kohathite Levite of the house of Korah
 2) a Kohathite Levite in the reign of king Hezekiah

    NASB:  two Levites
